check: Course title, slug, short description, long description, duration, language, level, access, certificate setting, final test setting, pass threshold, and thumbnail save correctly.
expectedResult: Reopening Course Setup shows saved values. Pass threshold is 80. Course remains Draft unless explicitly published through approved workflow.
notes: No developer/demo wording should appear in user-facing fields.

check: Thumbnail appears in catalogue card preview.
expectedResult: Card uses /assets/demo/hrba-advocacy/images/hrba-advocacy-course-thumbnail.jpg or a polished fallback if asset is missing.
notes: Image should not be distorted or cropped in a way that loses the local CSO advocacy scene.

check: Public course detail / preview header uses real saved course data.
expectedResult: Title, overview, image, capacity area, practice/standard where supported, outcomes, module outline, duration, language, and certificate information display correctly.
notes: Must not show creator controls or internal readiness/debug language.

expectedResult: Capacity area CAP-ADV, CSO practice PRAC-ADV-SAFE-MSG, standards, indicators, capacity gap, baseline/current practice, desired practice, K/S/M/E, course-fit decision, safeguards, and follow-up support persist after save/reopen.
notes: HRBA should appear as standard family STD-HRBA, not as capacity area.

check: Capacity Area filters CSO Practice; Capacity Area + CSO Practice + Standard Family filters Indicator.
expectedResult: Selecting CAP-ADV shows PRAC-ADV-SAFE-MSG. Indicator options include IND-ADV-MSG-01 and IND-ADV-SAFE-02 where relevant.
notes: No fallback invented reference values should be used.

check: Five enhanced outcomes save, reload, and remain ordered.
expectedResult: Each outcome has statement, capacity area, CSO practice, observable action, standard family, indicator, measurement level, assessment method, evidence type, and success criterion where provided.
notes: Course detail should show learner-friendly outcome statements, not all internal metadata.

check: Three modules and six lessons save and display in the course outline.
expectedResult: Course outline shows all modules and lessons in order, with required lessons and estimated duration.
notes: Total duration should align with Course Setup 90 minutes.

check: All 23 blocks import/create in correct order and persist after save/reopen.
expectedResult: Blocks render under the correct lessons with the configured content, alignment data, and small badges/chips where supported.
notes: Build Studio must keep three-column layout and avoid heavy metadata panels.

expectedResult: Scenario presents realistic options, consequences, best option C, retry behavior, and learning point. Feedback is readable and not color-only.
notes: This is the signature interactive block for the course.

check: Required resources appear in resource blocks.
expectedResult: Stakeholder mapping template and HRBA advocacy checklist show descriptive download buttons and correct file paths.
notes: Optional backup resources should not block import if unavailable.

check: Image blocks render with alt text and captions.
expectedResult: Community consultation and stakeholder mapping images display with proper alt text. Missing image fallback, if used, is polished.

check: Video block handles temporary URL and transcript.
expectedResult: Video block displays URL or approved embed. Transcript appears or is available. If video URL is not final, preview still remains acceptable with transcript fallback.
notes: Replace example.com URL before final stakeholder demo if possible.

check: Final test uses 80% threshold, 8 questions, correct answers, explanations, and retake rules.
expectedResult: Final Test Setup shows 80 threshold, retake allowed if supported, max attempts 3 if supported, and all questions linked to outcomes/indicators.
notes: Scored multiple choice and true/false belong in final test, not as lesson block types.

check: Creator preview uses selected saved course data.
expectedResult: Preview shows this HRBA course’s modules, lessons, blocks, resources, and final test summary. It does not show static demo-course data.

check: Learner-facing course output is clean and does not expose creator/admin controls.
expectedResult: Learner route shows polished participant-facing course layout only.
notes: No internal readiness checks, block config, or creator buttons should appear.

check: Readiness checks recognize metadata, outcomes, modules, lessons, blocks, final test, alt text, and resource presence.
expectedResult: Course is considered ready when required data is present. Any warning is specific and actionable.
notes: Keep readiness concise; do not create heavy diagnosis/governance dashboard.

check: No Phase 2/3 modules visible as active features.
expectedResult: No diagnosis, capacity map, action map, practical proof verification, badge workflow, CRM, donor management, collaboration, co-creation, or heavy compliance panels are added.

routeOrScreen: Catalogue, detail, creator preview, learner course player
check: Course displays acceptably on narrow/mobile viewport and core interactions remain usable.
expectedResult: Text is readable, cards stack cleanly, buttons are tappable, accordions/flashcards/scenario/checks are keyboard/touch accessible, and alt text/transcript/resource labels are present.
notes: Capture screenshots or visual QA notes in evidence pack.
